docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREAT SENECA FINANCIAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, BRODERICK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-07-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-08-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-22-2005
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-13-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREAT SENECA FINANCIAL CORPORATION SERVED AUG-22-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, BRODERICK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON SEP-13-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-07-2005 CONTINUED TO NOV-23-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CASE MANAGEMENT ORDER FILED BY PLTF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-04-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-23-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-04-2006 CONTINUED TO APR-05-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. JAN-04-2006 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF APR-05-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
